hooks.command: timeout 30 python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/status_manager.py --action session-init 2>/dev/null; CRED_STATUS=$(python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/credential_manager.py status 2>/dev/null); echo '=== SocialForge v1.4 ===' && echo '' && IMG_STATUS=$(echo "$CRED_STATUS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('image_generation','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); VID_STATUS=$(echo "$CRED_STATUS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('video_generation','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); if [ "$IMG_STATUS" = "ready" ]; then PROJECT=$(echo "$CRED_STATUS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('vertex_ai',{}).get('project_id','env'))" 2>/dev/null); echo "  Image generation: Vertex AI (project: $PROJECT)"; elif [ -n "$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT" ]; then echo "  Image generation: Vertex AI via env (project: $GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT)"; elif [ -n "$GEMINI_API_KEY" ]; then echo '  Image generation: AI Studio (fallback)'; else echo '  Image generation: NOT CONFIGURED'; echo '    Run /sf:setup to configure (one-time, 2 min)'; fi && if [ "$VID_STATUS" = "ready" ]; then echo '  Video generation: WaveSpeed (Kling v3.0 Pro)'; else echo '  Video generation: not configured (optional)'; echo '    Run /sf:setup --video to add'; fi && echo '' && echo 'Quick Start:' && echo '  /sf:setup        - Configure API credentials (first time only)' && echo '  /sf:brand-setup  - Configure a brand (5-10 min)' && echo '  /sf:index-assets - Index brand photo library' && echo '  /sf:new-month    - Start monthly calendar production' && echo '' && echo 'Already set up? /sf:status | /sf:switch-brand <name>'

hooks.prompt: If this Write/Edit is creating social media copy or image prompts for SocialForge, check: (1) No banned phrases from brand compliance-rules.json. (2) No fabricated statistics or unsourced claims. (3) Platform character limits respected. (4) Brand hashtags included where required. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this subagent is working on SocialForge content: (1) Load active brand-config.json — enforce brand colors, fonts, visual style. (2) Brand assets are sacred — AI generates around them, never replaces them. (3) All generated images must be shown to user for approval. (4) Follow the 4 creative modes: ANCHOR_COMPOSE, ENHANCE_EXTEND, STYLE_REFERENCED, PURE_CREATIVE. (5) Respect compliance-rules.json banned phrases and disclaimers. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this task involved SocialForge content production, verify: (1) All generated images approved by user. (2) Copy respects platform character limits. (3) Brand compliance checked (no banned phrases). (4) Logo overlay applied where required by brand-config. (5) Correct image dimensions for target platforms. If any check fails, list issues and ask how to proceed. Otherwise respond 'PASS'. $ARGUMENTS
